name: Classifications
summary: The Classifications class is a container/manager for all classifications in a model.

methods.summary: The [] method is used to get a classification schema by name or index.
methods.remarks: The [] method is used to get a classification schema by name or index.

params.name: index_or_name
params.doc: The index or name of the ClassificationSchema object.

returns.doc: schema - a ClassificationSchema object if successful, otherwise nil.

methods.name: each
methods.summary: The #each method is used to iterate through loaded classification schemas.
methods.remarks: The #each method is used to iterate through loaded classification schemas.

methods.name: keys
methods.summary: The keys method is used to get a list of keys in the Classifications class, which are the same as the names of the schemas.
methods.remarks: The keys method is used to get a list of keys in the Classifications class, which are the same as the names of the schemas.

methods.name: length
methods.summary: The #length method returns the number of loaded classification schemas.
methods.remarks: The #length method returns the number of loaded classification schemas.

methods.name: load_schema
methods.summary: The load_schema method is used to load a classification schema into a model.
methods.remarks: The load_schema method is used to load a classification schema into a model.

params.name: file
params.doc: Full path to the schema file

methods.name: size
methods.summary: The #size method returns the number of loaded classification schemas.
methods.remarks: The #size method returns the number of loaded classification schemas.

methods.name: unload_schema
methods.summary: The unload_schema method is used to unload a classification schema that was previously loaded into a model.
methods.remarks: The unload_schema method is used to unload a classification schema that was previously loaded into a model.

params.name: schema_name
params.doc: Name of the schema to unload
